summary: Completed testing of money transfer rejection display fixes. All major issues have been successfully resolved.

minor_issues.issue: Timestamps returned without 'Z' suffix (e.g., '2026-01-21T17:44:20.591000' instead of '2026-01-21T17:44:20.591000Z')
minor_issues.impact: Frontend has workaround to append 'Z' when parsing, so display is correct. However, API should return properly formatted ISO 8601 timestamps with timezone indicator.
minor_issues.workaround: Frontend code appends 'Z' if missing (lines 102-104 and 117-120 in ProfessionalDashboard.js)

passed_tests: Backend: Login with test user ashleyalt004@gmail.com
Backend: Rejected transfers have rejection_reason field populated
Backend: Non-rejected transfers show correct status (POSTED/SUBMITTED)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with transaction history
Frontend: Rejected transfers display 'Rejected' status badge (not 'Posted')
Frontend: Clicking rejected transaction opens modal with rejection reason
Frontend: Rejection reason 'Invalidddd' displayed correctly in modal
Frontend: Non-rejected transfers show 'Submitted' or 'Posted' status badges
Frontend: Non-rejected transfers do not show rejection reason section in modal
Frontend: Timestamps display in correct format (21 Jan 2026, 18:44)
Frontend: Modal opens and displays transaction details correctly

success_percentage.backend: 75% (9/12 tests passed - 3 timezone format tests failed due to missing 'Z' suffix)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (14/14 tests passed - all major functionality working correctly)

rejection_status_display.details: Rejected transfers now correctly show 'Rejected' status badge instead of 'Posted'. Verified with 2 rejected transfers in test user ashleyalt004@gmail.com's account.

rejection_reason_display.details: Rejection reasons are now displayed in the transaction detail modal. Tested with rejection reasons 'Invalidddd' and 'Blocked ' - both displayed correctly in modal.

non_rejected_transfers.details: Non-rejected transfers correctly show 'Posted' or 'Submitted' status badges. Verified with test user ashleyalt003@gmail.com who has no rejected transfers.

timezone_display.details: Timestamps display correctly in Europe/Rome timezone format (e.g., '21 Jan 2026, 18:44'). Backend returns timestamps without 'Z' suffix, but frontend code handles this by appending 'Z' before parsing.

failed_tests: Timezone Format (missing 'Z' suffix in API response)
Timezone Format (missing 'Z' suffix in API response)
Timezone Format (missing 'Z' suffix in API response)

screenshots: .screenshots/user2_dashboard.png - Second user dashboard with non-rejected transfers
.screenshots/user2_transaction_modal.png - Modal for non-rejected transfer (no rejection reason)
